translation.text: "I have not seen anything more beautiful than Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace). The sun seemed to shine in his face. Nor have I seen anyone more rapid in his gait than Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace). The earth seemed to be folded up for him. We must strenuously exert ourselves, while he is not subject to any stress."
“When "Ali described the Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace), he said: ‘When he walked, he moved as if he were descending a declivity'.”
translation.narrator: Ibrahim ibn Muhammad, one of the offspring of 'Ali ibn Abi Talib, told me:

translation.text: "When the Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) walked, he inclined forward as if he were descending a declivity.”
translation.narrator: Ali ibn Abi Talib said (may Allah ennoble his countenance):
